🧠
About FloorPlan AI

FloorPlan AI uses a Conditional GAN (CGAN) — advanced deep learning technology — to analyze user requirements and generate custom floor plan images for Pakistani housing plots.

Trained on real Pakistani housing datasets (5, 10, 20 Marla) to understand room layouts, proportions, and spatial relationships with high accuracy.

⭐Key Features
🤖
CGAN-Powered
Conditional GAN on Pakistani plots
🔒
Secure & Private
Data stored in PostgreSQL
📐
Multi-Plot Types
5, 10, 20 Marla + custom
📊

Room ratios & spacing
⚡

🖥️

Optimized CGAN output

🔍Model Input Parameters
🏗️
The CGAN model takes these inputs as conditions:
Plot Size (5/10/20 Marla)
Number of Bedrooms
Number of Bathrooms
Kitchen Required
Lounge / Drawing Room
Garage Included
Latent Noise Vector
Augmented Dataset
